mapper.select: select q.id,q.answer,q.type,q.options,q.content from exam_paper_question epq left join question q on epq.question_id = q.id left join exam_paper ep on ep.id = epq.paper_id where ep.id = #{paperId}

select ec.score from question q inner join exam_paper_question ec on q.id = ec.question_id where q.id = #{keyId} and q.answer = #{stuAnswer} and ec.paper_id in( select paper_id from exam_course where #{examId} = id )
